header.description: Boolean-return behavior specification for delegation category. Evaluator reads: spec_json + execution_log + query → returns boolean state per field.

trigger_conditions.header: DELEGATION TRIGGER CONDITIONS — Agent MUST delegate when ALL conditions are true

chaining_budget_granted.description: Dispatch brief explicitly grants a chaining budget with max depth and max fan-out.
chaining_budget_granted.observable_from_log: Dispatch brief contains chaining_budget field with max_depth and max_fan_out values greater than zero.

genuinely_orthogonal_subtask.description: Sub-task is genuinely orthogonal to the main architecture task and requires its own narrow vertical slice.
genuinely_orthogonal_subtask.observable_from_log: Sub-task requires different expertise domain (e.g., harness primitive, test authoring) than the architecture delta task.

subtask_in_other_archetype_lane.description: Sub-task falls within another archetype's lane (BACKEND_DEVELOPER for harness, TEST_ENGINEER for tests, RESEARCHER for patterns).
subtask_in_other_archetype_lane.observable_from_log: Sub-task nature matches another archetype's declared scope per AGENTS.md or dispatch brief.

required_actions.header: REQUIRED ACTIONS — Agent MUST do these when delegating

verify_chaining_budget_before_dispatch.description: Verify chaining budget is explicitly granted before dispatching.
verify_chaining_budget_before_dispatch.observable_from_log: execution_log shows chaining_budget check or confirmation before sub-agent dispatch call.

author_complete_brief.description: Include all required dispatch fields: objective, exact question, slice boundary, upstream reference, evidence threshold, output schema, stop condition, chaining budget, execution discipline.
author_complete_brief.observable_from_log: Sub-dispatch brief contains all 9 required fields: objective, exact_question, slice_boundary, upstream_reference, evidence_threshold, output_schema, stop_condition, chaining_budget, execution_discipline.

synthesize_not_pass_raw.description: Integrate sub-worker findings into architect_lead's return rather than passing raw output upward.
synthesize_not_pass_raw.observable_from_log: Agent return contains synthesis of sub-worker results, not raw sub-worker output verbatim.

prohibited_actions.header: PROHIBITED ACTIONS — Agent MUST NOT do these during delegation

no_unauthorized_dispatch.description: Dispatch without explicit chaining budget in dispatch brief.
no_unauthorized_dispatch.observable_from_log: sub-agent dispatch did not occur OR occurred after chaining_budget was confirmed granted.

no_budget_overflow.description: Exceed max depth or max fan-out.
no_budget_overflow.observable_from_log: dispatch depth never exceeds max_depth AND total dispatches never exceed max_fan_out.

no_within_capability_dispatch.description: Dispatch sub-workers for tasks within own architecture capability.
no_within_capability_dispatch.observable_from_log: All dispatched sub-tasks are outside architect_lead scope (boundaries/interfaces/state/contracts/invariants).
